name: Kirkcudbrightshire (United Kingdom, historic)
description: A field divided per saltire white and green — the green quarters bear stylised charges referencing the historic Stewartry of Kirkcudbright.
history: Recognised by the Flag Institute as the flag of the historic Stewartry of Kirkcudbright.

features.symbolism: elements drawn from the historic arms of Kirkcudbrightshire
